description: Allows remote control of and remote access to another machine. This add-on is based on NVDA Remote.
changelog: Now, if a sound file is played on the remote computer and that file is located under NVDA installation or config directories, that file will also be played in the controlling computer, provided that it exists

translations.displayName: Дистанционна помощ чрез Tele NVDA (Tele NVDA remote assistance)
translations.description: Позволява дистанционно управление и отдалечен достъп до друга машина. Тази добавка е базирана на NVDA Remote.
translations.changelog: Now, if a sound file is played on the remote computer and that file is located under NVDA installation or config directories, that file will also be played in the controlling computer, provided that it exists

translations.description: Umožňuje vzájemné ovládání počítačů přes internet. Tento doplněk je založen na doplňku NVDA Remote.
translations.changelog: Now, if a sound file is played on the remote computer and that file is located under NVDA installation or config directories, that file will also be played in the controlling computer, provided that it exists
